playbook.intent: Paging alert → contained impact → human-published postmortem → merged preventive PRs in backlog.
playbook.scope: An alert pages. On-call contains customer impact, documents root cause, lets the AI auto-draft a postmortem (no auto-publish), and converts action items into costed preventive PRs slotted into the backlog with named owners. No naming-and-shaming. Every incident raises a guardrail.

success-criteria.criterion: Action items slotted into backlog with named owners
Risk register updated with new entry or modified existing

stage.name: Contain + investigate
stage.intent: Stop the bleeding under read-only-investigation default and approval-gate boundaries.

tasks.task: Use AI triage to classify + route incoming signals
Apply tool-tier approval gate for any write action
Open circuit breakers / fall back if applicable

stage.decision-gate: Advance once user-facing impact is contained AND a senior engineer has confirmed read-only default was respected.

stage.name: Root cause
stage.intent: Walk logs, metrics, traces; chaos-eval evidence; reconstruct causal chain.

tasks.task: Apply chaos-eval fault-injection learnings if relevant
Write causal chain (5 whys at minimum)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the causal chain spans technical + organisational layers (not just 'a config was wrong').

stage.name: Postmortem — drafted, human-published
stage.intent: AI drafts; humans edit + publish. Blameless tone enforced.

tasks.task: Publish with explicit timeline + impact + RC + actions

stage.decision-gate: Required output: published postmortem with timeline + actions. No 'we'll publish later'.

stage.name: Preventive backlog
stage.intent: Action items become costed PRs slotted into the backlog with owners.

tasks.task: Cost each action by complexity + token estimate
Decide auto-applied vs human-reviewed (CodeQL autofix where safe)
Slot into backlog with named owners + risk register link

stage.decision-gate: Required: every action has an owner. Orphaned actions guarantee the next incident repeats.

extra.value: [Routine alert triage — covered by sentry-datadog-alert-triage, Annual audit prep — see soc2-gdpr-audit-prep, Incident comms templating beyond what runbook prescribes]
[On-call rotation with documented escalation path, Runbook system (markdown tagged steps), AI postmortem drafter wired (no auto-publish)]

[AI auto-publishes the postmortem — destroys trust if it includes wrong facts, Action items without owners — the repeat is just a matter of time, Naming-and-shaming language — kills future psychological safety, Skipping stakeholder comms — they hear about it from customers]
['Does the postmortem read as blameless and specific?', 'Can I point to each action item''s owner and due date?', 'Did the risk register actually change as a result?']

{human: faion get-content incident-postmortem-preventive-backlog --format md, agent: faion get-content incident-postmortem-preventive-backlog --format context, json: faion get-content incident-postmortem-preventive-backlog --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
